PS: 
 
 APS: 
 
 Diary: 
 
 
On Thu, 27 Feb 2025 at 10:58, Varun Chandra 
 wrote:
OFFICIAL
Thanks Matt, we spoke, and I've also downloaded the latest from the team on a couple of 
related discussions. You're kindly sending a note over but I think we have the essence of it, 
will debrief our group here this morning. Thanks again, Varun
Varun Chandra | Prime Minister's Special Adviser on Business and Investment
10 Downing Street, London SW1A 2AA | 
OFFICIAL
________________________________
From: Matthew Collins 
=
Sent: Thursday, February 27, 2025 12:42:29 AM
To: Varun Chandra 
Cc: Ailsa Terry 
; Mungo Woodifield 
; Peter 
Mandelson 
; Michael Ellam 
; 
Jonathan Powell 
; Morgan 
McSweeney 
Subject: 
 
 
 
 
Matt
Matt Collins
Deputy National Security Adviser Intelligence, Defence and Security
70 Whitehall, London, SW1A 2AS

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
